tasks.label: Regenerate clangd config from idedata
args: import json, sys; data = json.load(open('.esphome/idedata/actron-test.json')); all_includes = data['includes']['build'] + data['includes']['toolchain']; defines = data['defines']; yaml_flag = lambda f: f"    - '{f}'" if '"' in f else f'    - {f}'; lines = ['CompileFlags:', '  Add:', '    - -std=gnu++23']; [lines.append(yaml_flag(f'-D{d}')) for d in defines]; [lines.append(yaml_flag(f'-I{i}')) for i in all_includes]; open('.clangd', 'w').write('\n'.join(lines) + '\n'); print('Regenerated .clangd')
